title: Senior Sales Executive
description:
• Account Management
Manage assigned customer accounts, respond promptly to sales enquiries, and ensure the correct toolsets and high-quality services are delivered to meet customer requirements—ultimately supporting customers in achieving excellent end-product outcomes and satisfaction.

• Customer Engagement & Business Development
Visit existing customers regularly to strengthen relationships and proactively develop new sales opportunities or new accounts.

• After‑Sales Support
Maintain strong after‑sales service to ensure ongoing customer satisfaction and successful application of solutions.

• Credit Management
Monitor and maintain customers’ creditworthiness to support healthy business continuity.

• Market & Competitor Intelligence
Gather and report market trends, customer feedback, and competitor activities to support strategic decision‑making.

• Sales Administration
Handle day‑to‑day sales administrative duties accurately and efficiently.

• Promotion & Marketing
Promote company equipment and solutions by working closely with Headquarters on marketing activities and campaigns.

• Project Coordination
Liaise with customers on order status and delivery updates to ensure smooth and timely project implementation.

• Sales Target Achievement
Support the Head of Sales Department in achieving annual sales targets.

• RFQ & Proposal Support
Collaborate with Japan Sales Support and the technical team to prepare RFQs, quotations, and proposals that meet customer expectations.

• Cost Management
Maintain cost‑effective operations within the section to contribute to overall company profitability.

• Order & Payment Follow‑Up
Monitor purchase orders and follow up closely on payment collection to ensure timely closure of transactions.

• Execution of Management Plans
Implement plans, directives, and responsibilities assigned by higher management to achieve the company’s goals and objectives.

postedCompany.description:
SCREEN SPE Singapore Pte Ltd is an established company providing semiconductor products with world-class customer service. With clients in South East Asia and Southern Asia, we are well established within this region.

SCREEN SPE Singapore Pte. Ltd.’s history began with the establishing of Dainippon Screen Singapore Pte. Ltd in 1979, which started out catering to the Graphic Arts equipment industry.

The Semiconductor equipment division – now managed by SCREEN SPE Singapore Pte. Ltd. – was incepted in 1992 under Dainippon Screen Singapore, until SCREEN SPE Singapore Pte. Ltd. was officially incorporated on the 1st of April, 2017.

Our products are manufactured in-house from Japan, ensuring high quality control, efficient delivery, in-depth knowledge and excellent service. We offer a wide range of semiconductor equipment that can meet customers’ technology roadmap with high quality after-sales support.

Dedicated to customer service, we focus on sales and technical support for equipment sold to our Dealers and Customers in various manufacturing industries. As a prominent industry leader in Singapore, we aim to expand our services and develop a foothold in South East Asia and Southern Asia region while providing high standards of customer oriented service for our customers.
postedCompany.name: SCREEN SPE SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
